v1-hive.notes: First merge-then-freeze cycle. 480 Hive pairs + 160 replay. Hive jumped from 0.35 to 0.95.

v2-think-golden.notes: First thinking pairs batch. Golden chain established. Some regression from aggressive training.

v3-think.notes: Recovered from v2-think regression. Strong across all domains except C++ (0.808).

v4-recovery.notes: C++ recovery cycle: C++ jumped 0.808→0.933 (+15%). Small drops in JS/Python/Go within noise. Overall 0.933 vs v3 0.930. Currently deployed.
